'''jangobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidocyte|cnidocyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidocyte|cnidocyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jangobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jængebeth|jængebeth]] || [[word:jængebej|jængebej]] || [[word:jængebesh|jængebesh]] || [[word:jængebe|jængebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jangongoboth|jangongoboth]] || [[word:jangongoboj|jangongoboj]] || [[word:jangongobosh|jangongobosh]] || [[word:jangongobo|jangongobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jangoboth|jangoboth]] || [[word:jangoboj|jangoboj]] || [[word:jangobosh|jangobosh]] || [[word:jangobo|jangobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jangofboth|jangofboth]] || [[word:jangofboj|jangofboj]] || [[word:jangofbosh|jangofbosh]] || [[word:jangofbof|jangofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jangobotho|jangobotho]] || [[word:jangobojo|jangobojo]] || [[word:jangobosho|jangobosho]] || [[word:jangoboko|jangoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jangoboth|jangoboth]] || [[word:jangoboj|jangoboj]] || [[word:jangobosh|jangobosh]] || [[word:jangobo|jangobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jangobothol|jangobothol]] || [[word:jangobojol|jangobojol]] || [[word:jangoboshol|jangoboshol]] || [[word:jangobokol|jangobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jangobothotho|jangobothotho]] || [[word:jangobojojo|jangobojojo]] || [[word:jangoboshosho|jangoboshosho]] || [[word:jangoboko|jangoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jangobothon|jangobothon]] || [[word:jangobojon|jangobojon]] || [[word:jangoboshon|jangoboshon]] || [[word:jangobokon|jangobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jangobothoro|jangobothoro]] || [[word:jangobojoro|jangobojoro]] || [[word:jangoboshoro|jangoboshoro]] || [[word:jangobokoro|jangobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
